title: Jericho Donovan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Donovan}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:JerichoAndJosephineDonovan-AJ5.jpg]] |name=Jericho Donovan
(left) |homeworld=[[Mindabaal]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{JournalCite|5|Smugglers of the Outer Rim}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|He's mine! I saw him first!|Jericho Donovan|}} '''Jericho Donovan''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] and the older sister of [[Josephine Donovan]], whom she hated immensely, and daughter of [[James Ortell Donovan]]. She was an excellent [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], but lacked [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]] skills. ==Biography== ===Rebel without a cause=== A rebel by nature, Donovan did everything she could to spite her father. She was sent to the [[Mindabaal Royal Academy]] boarding school for troubled teens. There she became engaged in [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and reprogramming [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]] [[Computer/Legends|computers]], unbeknownst to the academy instructors. After graduation she and some classmates stole her father's [[Mindabaal Custom|Mindabaal pleasure yacht]], the ''Royal Flower'', and renamed it ''[[Jericho's Pride]]'' and set off on a career in smuggling and [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]], severing all ties with the Donavan family. ===Reunion=== Years later, she raided a [[Mindabaal]]ite ship and managed to kidnap the Mindabaalite [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]], who turned out to be her own sister. When they returned to Mindabaal, they found that it had been devastated in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary bombardment]]. From that day on, the sisters teamed up determined to thwart the Empire through smuggling and crime. Jericho would especially make use of her criminal and persuasive skills. ==Behind the scenes== Jericho Donovan shares her name with [[Wikipedia:Jericho|Jericho]], a city in [[Wikipedia:State of Palestine|Palestine]]. ==Sources== *{{JournalCite|5|Smugglers of the Outer Rim}} {{1stm}} *''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jericho Donovan |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Donovan, Jericho}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Pilots]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
